settings.label: Enable post-add-to-cart upsell modal
settings.info: Shows a small modal with complementary product suggestions right after the customer adds an item. Falls back to cart drawer if no recommendations are available.

settings.label: Enable cart drawer upsell
settings.info: Shows a 'Complete your order' carousel inside the cart drawer, powered by Shopify's recommendations API.

settings.label: Free shipping threshold ($)
settings.info: Amount in dollars that unlocks free shipping. Example: 75 = $75.
